title: Squirrel Removal Great Neck | Long Island Wildlife Control | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Great Neck, NY. Expert wildlife control for homes and businesses. Safe, humane removal $900-$2,500. Call today!
intro: Great Neck residents know that squirrels can quickly become a serious nuisance when they invade attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Our professional squirrel removal services protect Great Neck homes from the damage and health risks these persistent rodents create. With humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and damage repair, we restore peace to your Long Island property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to Great Neck, combining humane removal techniques with guaranteed exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Long Island's squirrel populations and provide same-day emergency services throughout Nassau County.
localContext: Great Neck's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Kings Point Park and Stepping Stone Park create ideal squirrel habitats, but these conditions also lead to frequent home invasions in the village's historic estates and waterfront properties. The area's mature Tudor and Colonial homes with their accessible attics and roof lines are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry during nesting season.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Great Neck?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Great Neck typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, full property inspection, exclusion work to seal entry points, and sanitation services. We provide free estimates for all Great Neck properties.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Great Neck attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible droppings in the attic, chewed electrical wires or wood, damaged insulation, and squirrels entering or exiting through roof vents or soffits. You may also notice an increase in squirrel activity on your roof or see nesting materials near entry points.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Great Neck humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-capture traps that safely contain squirrels without harm. Once captured, squirrels are relocated according to New York State wildlife regulations. We never use poisons or lethal methods, and we take special care during baby season to ensure mother squirrels and their young are kept together during removal.

faqs.question: How do you prevent squirrels from returning to my Great Neck home?
faqs.answer: After removal, we perform comprehensive exclusion work including sealing all entry points with heavy-gauge metal screening, installing chimney caps, repairing damaged vents and soffits, and trimming tree branches that provide roof access. We also treat affected areas with wildlife deterrents and provide a written warranty against re-entry. Our exclusion methods are designed to withstand Great Neck's coastal weather conditions.
